scope.selection_note: Codex-only deterministic prep from current entity canonical JSONL, current entity merges, current entity do-not-merge guards, and live validateRepo duplicate_global_identity messages after identity153-156 were applied. Proposals avoid stale ids, already-merged aliases, alias records that are current merge targets, target records that are current merge aliases, alias==target pairs, do-not-merge pairs, target chains, and broad community-board/committee labels unless identity evidence is unambiguous.

proposed_aliases.reason: Both current records identify Cubic as the OMNY/fare-payment vendor. The alias is a one-source Cubic/OMNY record; the target is the richer Cubic Transportation Systems Inc. record with many OMNY and fare-payment source aliases.

duplicate_issues: Global entity records entity_cubic-omny and entity_cubic-transportation-systems share identity key entity_cubic.

exclusions_and_guards: Excluded aliases already present in current data/identity-overrides/merges.json entity aliases.
Excluded candidate aliases that are current merge targets, including entity_blanca-lopez-166966, entity_david-keller-meeting-doc-68311, and entity_meeting-doc-105931-craig-cipriano.
Excluded candidate targets that are current merge aliases to avoid target chains.
Excluded alias==target pairs and any pair present in current data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json.
Excluded stale aliases or targets missing from current data/canonical/entities.jsonl.
Excluded broad community-board and generic community-advisory-committee collisions unless borough/name evidence was unambiguous.
Excluded entity_grand-central-madison station-to-operating-company collisions because the current records distinguish a station/facility from the MTA Grand Central Madison Operating Company.

command_evidence.command: bun --print 'import { validateRepo } from "./packages/pipeline/src/validate.ts"; const r=validateRepo(); const d=r.issues.filter(i=>i.code==="duplicate_global_identity"); console.log(JSON.stringify({duplicate_global_identity:d.length}, null, 2));'
command_evidence.result: Confirmed live validateRepo duplicate_global_identity backlog is 689.

command_evidence.command: bun --print 'import { validateRepo } from "./packages/pipeline/src/validate.ts"; const d=validateRepo().issues.filter(i=>i.code==="duplicate_global_identity" && i.message.includes("Global entity records")); console.log(JSON.stringify({entity_duplicate_global_identity:d.length}, null, 2));'
command_evidence.result: Confirmed current entity duplicate_global_identity issue count is 531.
Read current entity alias overrides for already-merged, alias-is-target, and target-chain guards.
Read current entity do-not-merge pairs for pair-level guard checks.

command_evidence.command: bun --print deterministic guard/evidence script over data/canonical/entities.jsonl, merges.json, do-not-merge.json, and validateRepo()
command_evidence.result: Verified all 12 proposed aliases have current canonical alias/target records, no existing entity merge alias, no alias-as-current-merge-target, no target-as-current-merge-alias, no do-not-merge hit, and alias_id != target_id.
